revision.comment: adding link, tested in sandbox, explained on talk page
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding link, tested in sandbox, explained on talk page
adding link, tested in sandbox, explained on talk page
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Citation style}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Citation style | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | small = {{{small|}}} | class = ambox-citation_style | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''has an unclear [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Citation style|citation style]]'''. {{#if:{{{reason|{{{details|}}}}}}|The reason given is: '''{{Terminate sentence|{{{reason|{{{details}}}}}}}}'''}} | fix = The references used may be made clearer with a different or consistent style of [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citation]] and [[Help:Footnotes|footnoting]]. | cat = Wikipedia references cleanup | all = All articles needing references cleanup | cat2 = Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify | all2 = All articles covered by WikiProject Wikify | date = {{{date|}}} | removalnotice = yes }}<!--{{Citation style}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_style here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
